description: Legal record (#13a). Loan contract, summary. It states that Barakāt b. Abū l-Ḥasan owes 30 (dirhams) to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Abū l-Faḍl and will pay him 1 dirham weekly starting from the 'month of the holiday.' This pertains to the record on the facing page (Yevr.-Arab. I 1700.8, recto, a); perhaps the scribe (Mevorakh b. Natan) made a note of what the parties declared prior to writing it into a formal document.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
